c.d: Number of unique users who actively engage with the game monthly, indicating popularity and engagement
c.s: App Store analytics, Google Play analytics, Third-party analytics platforms

c.d: Overall rating score from user reviews across app stores, reflecting user satisfaction and game quality
c.s: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

c.d: Monthly revenue generated through in-app purchases, subscriptions, and advertisements
c.s: App Store revenue reports, Google Play revenue reports, Market research firms

c.d: Variety of gameplay mechanics and genres represented to appeal to different gaming preferences
c.s: App Store categories, Game developer descriptions, Gaming review sites

c.d: Regular content updates, bug fixes, and new features indicating active development and long-term viability
c.s: App Store update history, Google Play update history, Developer release notes
